name: Chicken Potato & Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Chopped fresh tarragon (or) 1 tbsp Dried tarragon
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dressing: Combine mustard and egg in a large mixing bowl. Mix well and set aside.
2. In a small saucepan, bring cream and dried tarragon leaves to a boil over medium heat on the stove. Remove from heat and whisk hot cream into the mustard-yolk mixture. If using fresh tarragon, add it now. Slowly whisk in 3 tablespoons olive oil. Set dressing aside.
3. Prepare the potato salad: Cut unpeeled potatoes into 1-inch pieces. Place in a pot, cover with water, and bring to high heat on the stove until soft. Drain potatoes, place in a mixing bowl, pour over vinegar, and let sit for 5 minutes.
4. Prepare the chicken: Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a medium skillet over medium heat. Add chicken, cover, and cook for 5 minutes. Scrape cooked chicken into the bowl with dressing. Add potatoes and mix well.
5. To serve, add spinach to the bowl, mix well, and mound on plates.
This is a favorite at Trump's restaurant in Los Angeles. With protein, starch, and vegetable, it's a full meal.
